headline: T. Rowe Price Group Inc (NASDAQ:TROW) Shows a Strong Technical Breakout Setup With a 9/10 Setup Score
summary: TROW shows a strong technical breakout setup with a 7/10 technical rating and 9/10 setup quality. Trading at $104.53, the stock forms a bull flag pattern near resistance, offering a potential entry above $106 with defined risk parameters.
